horoscope: Mercury stations and turns direct today, dear Aries, and while this change of direction brings less indecision in the very near future, today can be a little confusing. Over the coming days and weeks, you'll find life a little easier to navigate as projects or appointments begin to move forward, and motivation increases. There can be improved communications and more information that helps you move forward. Home projects that were left undone now resume. Keep things simple for best results, and take your time! The Sun forms a square to Chiron today, pulling up insecurities and soft spots in the first part of the day. Indeed, sensitivity now can interfere with healthy, growth-oriented interactions, but exploring why can be helpful. Fortunately, as the day progresses, you quite naturally seek ways to heal and improve. You may take pleasure in putting your faith in others or giving someone the benefit of the doubt.

With Mercury's station today, dear Taurus, an emotional recharge or taking a light schedule can be ideal. Mercury turns direct after a retrograde phase since June 29th. It's good news, but because it's a shift of direction, there can be some disorientation temporarily. While it's best not to jump into action, new launches, or major decisions, you'll enjoy some forward motion on delayed projects in the coming days and weeks. Further information can arrive that facilitates decision-making. Aim to work on activities that help clear up delays and set the ball rolling to make progress. Transportation and educational difficulties or blocks will clear up shortly. Today, you'll need to be especially sensitive when it comes to choosing words to express yourself. As the day advances, you can feel far more focused and determined to make improvements.

The end of Mercury's retrograde today can come as a relief, dear Gemini, even though there can be a bit of chaos or some misunderstandings today as the shift occurs. In the days ahead, clearer communications are likely, information comes through, or previously delayed initiatives move forward. With Mercury's current and extended transit of your solar second house, this can be about money, personal possessions, or business. You'll feel better equipped to move your plans ahead and make informed decisions. Ease things forward in a few days. Activities that bolster feelings of inner strength can be most magical now. Fortunately, as the day advances, there's a gentle ease or flow between you and others. In fact, satisfaction comes from helping others out with information or advice.

Mercury's retrograde period comes to an end today, dear Cancer. Since Mercury has been retrograde in your sign for the last few weeks, this direct turn is especially significant for you. Some of the tension you've been feeling of late can dissipate as you take a clearer look at things. While it's a signal that communication problems are likely to clear up soon, don't expect it to happen in a day. Slowly but surely, others will find it easier to understand and communicate with you, and your stalled plans will resume, or information will surface that helps you move forward and make decisions. For today, take care with the words you choose to express yourself. Misunderstandings are entirely possible as Mercury, the planet of communication, shifts directions. Think hard on a matter only if the process excites you and serves you well–and if you know your limits! As the day advances, it’s a good time to develop your talents, work on a money-making venture, or put effort into finding something lost or hidden. Business, career, and reputation get a boost today, and the key is to extend your help, services, advice, or expertise to someone in need.

Aim to learn from frustrations emerging today with Mercury stationing and turning direct, dear Leo, as you'll have many opportunities to improve conditions from now on. With today's shift, it may be wise to choose your words and your battles wisely! Today is not ideal for entirely new projects and endeavors, but you'll be seeing forward movement on delayed projects in the coming days and weeks. Delays lift, or word comes through that helps you make decisions and ends a state of limbo. You may enjoy increased faith in your dreams and ideas. Behind-the-scenes matters tend to go particularly well for you right now, and you may begin to see a grand design behind recent events in your life. As the day advances, giving a partner or friend the benefit of the doubt or a pass for something you might normally not let slide can be in focus and can enhance your bond. You can feel quite proud of yourself! While there may be some differences in your visions of where you’re heading or your long-term goals, there can be great understanding now.

Mercury has been retrograde for over three weeks, dear Virgo, and that cycle comes to an end today. Remember, however, that communications can remain confusing as Mercury changes direction, and perhaps even more so. It's not an ideal time to bring up sensitive topics just for the time being, as misunderstandings can be frustrating, and in some cases, wholly unnecessary. However, you'll shortly be seeing some forward movement in relationships or pursuits that have recently suffered from delays or blocks. Tricky problems and indecisiveness should clear in the days and weeks ahead. Mercury's forward turn in your social sector promises more clarity and understanding with friends. While there can be some lack of confidence at times today, as the day advances, you might thoroughly enjoy providing a service or devoting some time to helping others.

Mercury turns direct today after more than three weeks of retrograde motion, dear Libra. While this means an imminent clearing of obstacles and delays, the day itself can be somewhat confusing until you get your bearings. In the days ahead, however, projects will unblock, and delays will lift. You might see work projects advance, and communications open up, particularly with associates and bosses, parents, or managers. You'll begin to feel the fog lifting in the coming days, and you're likely to be clearer about your goals. Career matters tend to resume or pick up speed. Today can be confusing in spots, but as the day advances, connecting with others and making a concerted effort to understand where they are coming from can be satisfying now. You feel good about yourself when you put your faith in people you care about.

Mercury turns direct today after several weeks of retrograde motion, dear Scorpio. Communication or transportation delays and breakdowns may have been more common for you in the past few weeks, and while you're not entirely out of the woods on this level, more clarity is coming! Decision-making on travel, publishing, and educational matters becomes clearer, and stalled initiatives may now resume or pick up speed. Delayed or missing information comes in, and if you're still into it, you can now move forward. It's best not to rush to put your plans into motion just yet. As the day advances, it’s easy to rise above problems, and you might enjoy helping someone out or simply expressing your faith in them. Work might benefit from offering something freely and gaining the trust of others in the process.

There can be some confusion or misunderstood communications today as Mercury changes direction, dear Sagittarius, but this turnaround is good news. Mercury's direct motion helps financial and intimate matters gain clarity or move forward and can clear recent blocks and slowdowns. This will help fill in the blanks on some issues, leading to better choices and decisions. You'll be in good shape for negotiating about money or time-sharing in the coming days and weeks. Today, be more mindful of directions and communications as this shift occurs. As the the day advances, it becomes a little easier to convey what you mean and communicate with impact. It’s a fine time for expressing your faith in someone, offering help, particularly through words of advice or information, and finding new things to love about someone.

Mercury is shifting direction today after over three weeks of retrograde motion, dear Capricorn. While this helps clear information clogs, the shift itself can demand some reorienting today. Look forward to increased clarity, particularly in your relationships, as Mercury slowly regains its regular speed, and you feel more confident about making the right decisions. For now, take special care in your interactions with others and consider that you may be missing important details. Don't jump too quickly into action just yet! Instead, allow new information to trickle in. Some minor discomfort may be necessary for you to get over a hump today, but as the day progresses, the motivation to improve and advance is with you, and this fuels you. You can accomplish far more than usual when you feel dedicated.

Today's energies can be frustrating if you're attempting to push forward plans, mainly related to work or health, dear Aquarius, but there are strong indicators that things are unblocking. The key is to be patient a little while longer. Mercury turns direct after over three weeks of retrograde motion, and routine matters tend to iron out or smooth out. Information comes in that helps you make stronger choices and decisions. More clarity is on its way! Be clearer in your dealings than usual today during this transition period for the best results. As the day advances, there is generosity in your manner that endears others to you. You are willing to put in extra effort or express your dedication to your relationships.

Mercury changes direction and ends its retrograde cycle today, dear Pisces, which is great news. This shift can help unclog information so that your choices and decisions are clearer in the days and weeks ahead. It's time to come at problems from a new angle! Further information emerges, and this releases energy to flow forward. You may be reconsidering a goal or dealing with something that you overlooked so that you can clear the path for moving on. While today may be more chaotic or confusing than most days, this shift in direction can bring improved communications and more clarity in romantic and creative affairs as you advance. Be slightly more vigilant when it comes to following instructions and expressing yourself today, but you can look forward to the lifting of certain delays and blocks. As today advances, it's a good time for concentration and dedication, which is a magical combination.
